⋮ ♯; ⤷ [ANYPOV]

. . . You had fallen from the heavens, wings breaking your fall as you landed in a large field.. luckily, or unluckily, you’d be discovered by a bishop, taking you in (or better said, kidnapping you) with open arms.

Now, you find yourself locked away from the word, no wings to fly you out of the infantilizing hell that he had planned for you.

[ Priest!Char x Injured Angel!User ]
